reviews.comment:
Estuvimos 20 minutos esperando a q el empleado de nombre franco se le ocurra atendernos y encima al momento de cargar nafta nos dejo esperando 15 min mas porque ya quería hacer el cambio de turno le pedimos un libro de quejas e indicó q no tiene .

(Translated by Google)
We waited 20 minutes for the employee named Franco to decide to help us and on top of that, when it was time to fill up with gas, he left us waiting for another 15 minutes because he wanted to change shifts. We asked him for a complaint book and he indicated that he didn't have one.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtellDNmVnEAE

reviews.comment:
